videos.title: Cloning Cheap Creatures is How Simic Gets Aggro
videos.description:
Jackal, Genius Geneticist/Druneth and cloning an army of little guys is making the ladder feel Simic's aggression!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-cloning-cheap-creatures-is-how-simic-gets-aggro
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7372105#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/fvl57
